title: Unique Axolotl Buckets
description: Shows axolotl variants inside their buckets (no mods required)
body:
Makes each axolotl bucket depict their variant:
- Leucistic (default)
- Wild
- Gold
- Cyan
- Blue

**Fully compatible with vanilla Minecraft, no mods required!**

![Default (leucistic) axolotl in a bucket](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/829e64b54e1e940a30f16807cbe36792e314be6a.png)![Wild axolotl in a bucket](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b21961bb6c71c1188f9e5fdb6539821db56551b6.png)![Gold axolotl in a bucket](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01024c320d2cc23cbb6d0e222fd90ee37e6e2f03.png)![Cyan axolotl in a bucket](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f22b9d0ccf89bc7f18c5ff2009a8bebecfb62d66.png)![Blue axolotl in a bucket](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e531837ae12eae1fbc3f7de67dcdd99cd9956646.png)
